title: hypobathrum venulosum
intro: Hypobathrum venulosum is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia, and is commonly known as the 'Thorny Coral Tree'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hypobathrum venulosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
